title: Site Options

fields.label: Business phone (dialable)
fields.name: business_phone
fields.instructions: Digits only, eg 1300667818. Used for tel: links.

fields.label: Display phone (human-readable)
fields.name: display_phone
fields.instructions: Formatted version shown to visitors, eg 1300 667 818.

fields.label: Site logo (header & footer)
fields.name: site_logo
fields.instructions: The Pressure Cleaning Perth logo. Falls back to the bundled brand asset if empty.

fields.label: Footer blurb
fields.name: footer_blurb
fields.default_value: A family-owned Perth business providing specialist pressure washing and soft wash services to residential, strata and commercial properties across the Perth metro area. Fully insured. 5-star rated. Perth's pressure cleaning specialists.

fields.label: Footer copyright text
fields.name: footer_copyright
fields.instructions: Shown after the year. Leave blank for "{Site name}. All rights reserved."

fields.label: "Get a Free Quote" button URL
fields.name: nav_quote_url
fields.instructions: Where the header / mega-menu quote buttons link. Defaults to the Contact page.

fields.label: Default quote form (Gravity Forms ID)
fields.name: default_quote_form_id
fields.instructions: The Gravity Forms form ID used for hero / contact quote forms when a page has none set.

description: Site-wide content shown on every page (contact, branding, footer, CTA).
